message:
beads: update task status for seed reproducibility verification

Marked bd-mblr.4.3.2 (Reproducibility verification tests for seeds) as
in_progress. Closed bd-mblr.4.2.3 (compatibility roundtrip scenarios) and
bd-mblr.4.3.1 (deterministic seed manifest) with evidence of completed
implementations.
